Sandbox_IKFRVP: IKappaID & Faded's True Real World Vehicle Physics
Sandbox_IKFRVP_Enabled_tooltip: Turns the vehicle physics tuning framework on or off.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_ProfileTuning_tooltip: Applies clean-room real-world-ish engine force and mass profiles to recognized vanilla vehicles.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericMultiplierTuning: Apply generic tuning to unknown vehicles
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericMultiplierTuning_t: When enabled, vehicle scripts without a curated profile receive only the generic engine-force and mass multipliers.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_AuditOnly_tooltip: Logs calculated tuning plans without applying them.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CSRCompatibilityMode_tool: Keeps this mod out of CSR-owned vehicle systems and logs CSR detection when debug logging is enabled.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CSRTowAssistCompensation_: When Common Sense Reborn tow assist is active, slightly reduces curated engine-force targets if CSR tow factors are set above their defaults. This is calculated once at startup.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CSRTowAssistCompensationS: How strongly high CSR tow assist factors reduce this mod's curated engine-force targets. 0 disables the reduction, 1 applies the full calculated reduction.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_DebugLogging_tooltip: Writes startup, tuning, and vehicle probe diagnostics to the console.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_ProbeIntervalTicks_toolti: Number of player-update ticks between debug vehicle probe logs.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_PowerScale_tooltip: Multiplies curated engine-force targets for all recognized powered vehicles.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_MassScale_tooltip: Multiplies curated mass targets for all recognized non-trailer vehicles.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportPowerBias_tooltip: Extra multiplier applied to curated sport and race vehicle power targets.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyVehiclePowerBias_too: Extra multiplier applied to curated truck, van, SUV, and step-van power targets.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericEngineForceMultipl: Multiplier for unprofiled vehicle engine force when generic tuning is enabled.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericMassMultiplier_too: Multiplier for unprofiled vehicle mass when generic tuning is enabled.
